exercises.example_sentence: ちょっと待っ__ください。

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た is past tense form — it doesn't combine with ください to make polite requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.ます: ます cannot directly connect to ください — the te-form is needed for polite requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で is a particle meaning 'at/by' — it cannot function as a verb connector with ください.

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た indicates past tense — it doesn't work with ください to make present requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.ない: ない is negative form — it would create 'please don't open' which changes the meaning entirely.
wrong_choice_explanations.よう: よう indicates volitional/intention — it doesn't combine with ください for making requests.

exercises.example_sentence: もう一度言っ__ください。
exercises.translation: Please say it one more time.

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た is past tense — it doesn't create proper polite request structure with ください.
wrong_choice_explanations.ます: ます is polite form but doesn't connect to ください — te-form is required for requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.ば: ば is conditional form — it doesn't combine with ください to make polite requests.

exercises.example_sentence: 宿題を手伝っ__ください。
exercises.translation: Please help me with my homework.

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た is past tense form — it doesn't work with ください for making present requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.ながら: ながら means 'while doing' — it doesn't combine with ください to create polite requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.から: から means 'from/because' — it doesn't function as a verb connector with ください.

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た indicates past action — it doesn't work with ください to make present requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.ます: ます cannot directly connect to ください — the te-form is needed for polite requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.ない: ない is negative form — it would create 'please don't be quiet' which is the opposite meaning.

exercises.example_sentence: この本を読ん__ください。

wrong_choice_explanations.だ: だ is copula — it doesn't work as a verb connector with ください in this context.
wrong_choice_explanations.た: た is past tense — it doesn't create proper request structure with ください.
wrong_choice_explanations.ば: ば is conditional — it doesn't combine with ください to make polite requests.

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た is past tense — it doesn't work with ください for making present requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.ます: ます is polite form but doesn't connect properly to ください — te-form is required.
wrong_choice_explanations.よう: よう indicates volitional/intention — it doesn't combine with ください for making requests.

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た is past tense form — it doesn't create proper polite request with ください.
wrong_choice_explanations.ながら: ながら means 'while doing' — it doesn't combine with ください to make polite requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で is a particle — it cannot function as the required verb connector in this request structure.

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た is past tense — it doesn't work with ください to make present requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.ます: ます cannot directly connect to ください — the te-form is needed for polite requests.
wrong_choice_explanations.そう: そう indicates appearance or hearsay — it doesn't combine with ください for making requests.

exercises.example_sentence: ゆっくり話し__ください。

wrong_choice_explanations.た: た is past tense form — it doesn't create proper request structure with ください.
wrong_choice_explanations.ない: ない is negative form — it would mean 'please don't speak' which contradicts the intended meaning.
wrong_choice_explanations.ば: ば is conditional form — it doesn't combine with ください to make polite requests.
